# 2. WHAT THIS MEANS FOR v1.8
# v1.8 must redesign the regime-tagging mechanism with three changes:
# (a) Softer regime boundaries: replace hard thresholds with soft scoring functions so that a
#     state can have non-zero membership in multiple regimes simultaneously. For example
#     continuous regime_score per regime based on how far the state is from the regime centroid
#     rather than a boolean gate.
# (b) Multi-label regime scoring: instead of mutually exclusive regime assignment
#     decision to carry a weighted regime vector (e.g.
